title: pseudodictamnus latibracteolatus
intro: Pseudodictamnus latibracteolatus, also known as False Dicot, is a plant species belonging to the family Boraginaceae. The plant's medicinal properties lie in its leaves, roots, and stems, which are used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Pseudodictamnus latibracteolatus include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help alleviate pain and promote wound healing. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction or infusion, often used in herbal medicine to treat a range of ailments.
